About Me
Who I Am

I'm Pratik Tomar, a frontend developer and cinematic video editor based in India who loves turning ideas into reality through clean code and beautiful visuals.

I specialise in building responsive, performant websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. On the creative side, I craft cinematic reels and travel videos with a dreamy, emotional style.

Currently expanding into full-stack with Node.js. Always excited to work on something new — let's build something great together.
